title: Finalise authentication flow
description: Complete the end-to-end authentication flow including OAuth integration, token refresh handling, and error states. Blocked by OAuth token refresh bug.

title: Write API documentation
description: Document all public API endpoints including request/response formats, authentication requirements, rate limits, and error codes.

title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
description: Configure GitHub Actions for automated builds, testing, and deployment to staging on merge to main.

title: Design onboarding screens
description: Create mockups for the 3-screen onboarding flow with progressive disclosure, approved in the design review.

title: Fix mobile responsive layout bug
description: Resolve responsive layout regressions on the dashboard and onboarding screens affecting mobile viewports.

title: Load test API endpoints
description: Run load tests against all critical API endpoints to verify performance under expected production traffic levels.

title: Implement user dashboard
description: Build the main user dashboard showing task overview, recent activity, and key metrics.

title: Set up error monitoring
description: Configure error monitoring and alerting for production, including integration with the CI/CD pipeline.

title: Write onboarding copy
description: Write user-facing copy for all onboarding screens, including tooltips and help text.

title: Fix OAuth token refresh bug
description: Resolve the token refresh failure when the auth provider returns non-standard error format. Support ticket #4821 open with provider.

title: Create beta feedback form
description: Design and deploy a feedback form for beta testers to report issues, rate features, and suggest improvements.

title: Review and address beta feedback
description: Triage and categorise all beta feedback into v1 must-have vs v1.1 nice-to-have, then address critical items.

title: Implement rate limiting
description: Add rate limiting to all public API endpoints to prevent abuse and ensure fair usage.

title: Update database indexes
description: Analyse query performance and add or update database indexes to optimise slow queries identified in profiling.

title: Configure SSL certificates
description: Set up SSL certificates for production domain. Blocked on domain registrar transfer expected to complete by April 11.
